title: psychotria axillaris
intro: Psychotria axillaris, also known as the "Wild Coffee" or "Mountain Coffee", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a medicinal plant native to Central and South America, traditionally used for its stimulating and analgesic properties. The plant's leaves have been used in herbal medicine for their ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and improve circulation, as well as for their potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Psychotria axillaris can be made into a tea, tincture, or infused oil, providing a natural alternative for those seeking to alleviate various health issues.
